summary: Verified BookCover click hit-testing bug fix and full regression on Empire luxury menu app (frontend-only). Bug fix confirmed working: cover-open-btn, book-cover surface click, Enter key, and Space key all successfully open the book from BookCover to Chef's Welcome (page 1/17) on both desktop 1440x900 and mobile 390x844. All 17 categories navigate correctly via next/prev. Dish detail modal, search overlay, category-nav, filter buttons, Escape close, and Arrow key navigation all functional. Left/right spread on desktop shows Empire placeholder on page 1 and prev category on subsequent pages without duplication.
critical_code_review_comments: BookCover renders twice in DOM (desktop hidden md:flex + mobile md:hidden) with same data-testid='book-cover' and 'cover-open-btn'. Consider making the hidden container's testids unique or use aria-hidden to prevent test selector ambiguity. Currently mitigated with :visible selector.
Search input testid 'search-input' only exists when overlay open — acceptable, but ensure tests wait for AnimatePresence.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Correct testids: dish-detail-modal (NOT dish-modal), filter-{id}-btn (NOT filter-{id}), search-result-{id} (NOT search-result), nav-open-btn (NOT toc-btn), modal-close-btn (only rendered while modal open). BookCover has duplicate DOM instances for desktop/mobile — use ':visible' Playwright selector. page-indicator has TWO instances (category name + '1/17' fraction) — concatenate both texts when asserting page state.
verified_flows: Entrance -> click open-menu-btn -> book cover appears
Click book-cover surface top -> book opens
Focus book-cover + Enter key -> book opens (accessibility)
Focus book-cover + Space key -> book opens (accessibility)
Next-page-btn x16 covers all 17 categories in correct order
Dish click -> dish-detail-modal opens with rupee price (e.g., ₹780) and 6 ingredient pills
search-open-btn -> search-overlay + input; typing 'paneer' returns results
nav-open-btn -> category-nav with 17 items; clicking item jumps to that page
Left spread on page 1 shows 'Empire' placeholder; on page 2 shows Chef's Welcome (prev category); right shows current — no duplication
